nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 古希腊语
nodes.summary: 古希腊语是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括白眼潜鸭、Semipalmated plover、Philippine scops owl等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Philippine scops owl
nodes.summary: Philippine scops owl（Philippine scops owl，学名 Otus megalotis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于古希腊语、菲律賓島嶼列表，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 菲律賓島嶼列表
nodes.summary: 菲律賓島嶼列表是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Philippine scops owl、菲律賓小隼，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: nigrorum) were formerly considered conspecific but are now classified as separate species. Distinguishing features of these birds include their large upright ears from which they get their specific name megalotis, Ancient Greek for "large ears". Philippine scops owls are relatively small, sedentary birds that are naturally found in the forest understory. There are three subspecies which show variations in morphology and are distributed among different islands of the Philippine Archipelago

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
